plugins.name: corgi
plugins.description: AI skills for authoring corgi-compose.yml, running a stack detached and waiting until healthy, debugging local or deployed issues, tracker-side planning (Linear/Jira standup, triage, and epic-decompose tied to real PR+CI state across services), picking up build-ready tickets (explicit links or the agent-labelled queue) and dispatching them to stories, suggesting ranked product + engineering improvements, shipping batches of Linear/Jira issues or a feature description as draft PRs/MRs, and reviewing existing PRs/MRs with inline suggestions
